message: People are chatting with those around them, savoring the lavish meal decorating the table.
As I watch this, I get the impression that I'm the only one peering into the screen.
I feel as if I'm left behind as the sole audience member.
With the arrival of two actresses, Meryl and Jennifer, the atmosphere seems to brighten.
I'm truly impressed by the director who has gathered such a luxurious cast.
Guy is unusually dressed in a semi-formal style.
Considering the relationship with his partner,
it's a style that makes sense.
However, since he's not used to this kind of look, he still gives off a somewhat incongruous impression.
Looking at the attendees’ style, everyone is dressed a little more stylishly than usual,
so Guy looks out of place.
It's hard to believe this guy is my best friend.
Perhaps because of the two actresses' presence, Guy seems somewhat restless for some reason.
He really seems eager to talk to either Jennifer or Meryl.
At this rate,
it's only natural for him to be anxious.
Guy
Hey,
don’t you feel like you’re in the wrong place?
What’s a top major leaguer saying this for?
Guy
No way, I’m not good in situations like this. First off, there are just too few women.
Guy
Hey,
what do you mean, even though I brought you here?
Guy,
I heard Meryl Ann Kline and Jennifer Rumford are coming. Haven't they arrived yet?
Guy,
Inviting the glamorous popular guy of the NY Nets, the driving force behind their revival, and yet there's this lack of female presence.
Guy,
Guy.
Moreover, my only best friend is an excellent private detective. It would be disrespectful to the private detective as well.
Ah, that part about the excellent private detective doesn't sit well with me.
Guy
Hurry up and show that.
By the way, how did you introduce me? I feel like I was greatly misunderstood by the director’s daughter.
Guy
I told the director, I'll bring a top-notch detective from New York!
What a big liar you are.
Guy
Why not? This could land us some work, right? I think I'm being helpful.
Guy
Hey,
you didn't have a girlfriend just now, right?
Ah.
Guy
Don't you have any desire to enjoy a new life instead of being stuck in the past?
Not really, I'm not stuck in the past or anything. It’s just that there are no candidates around me right now.
Guy
Really? Well, that aside, you have a chance to meet an actress tonight.
Guy
Do your best! Aim to be friends with the actress!!
Guy
Hey, hey, I'm busy right now, so leave me alone.
Busy?
Guy
An actress is finally here. Just sharing a few words.
Because of stuff like that,
wouldn't she be sad?
Guy
I don't care about that.
Guy
I'm glad that you're concerned about us. But we have our own way of doing things.
It’s not like I want to meddle or anything. Just
Guy
I don't want to see my ex crying.
Is that what you want to say?
Guy
Stop saying it like that.
Guy
Sorry. I've got my own things going on. Can you just leave me alone for now?
Guy
I've been thinking about a lot of things lately. About the future, about my job.
I’ve got so many thoughts that I feel like I’m going to be crushed.
Is it wrong for me to think that during times like this, you should consult me or
someone like me?
Is that thinking wrong?
Guy
When you're really troubled, you don’t feel like talking to anyone. Once you have your thoughts a bit sorted out, you might start to open up.
I’ll be waiting.
Guy
Thanks. If things go south, I’ll be the first to confide in you.
That's something to be happy about.
Guy
Can you lend me some cash?
Like begging for money or something?
Ugh, is that what you mean?
Guy
Ahaha, you’re making such an awful face.
Guy
When you get older, life gets boring.
Aren’t you a bit young for that?
Guy
That’s true in terms of age.
Guy
But, after achieving my childhood dream, I feel like I've lost my goals.
It's like my will to live has shrunk.
Even though I give dreams to many people. It's a luxurious worry.
Guy
There's no one who gives me dreams.
Guy
Damn, I'm ending up with only negative thoughts.

Ｖ＝
Ｎ＝
